posts.title: He's Back. Tiger Just Told Augusta to Set an Extra Place at the Table.
posts.excerpt: Fourteen months of silence. One Instagram post. And suddenly the entire golf world stopped breathing. Woods says he's playing the Masters.
posts.body: Fourteen months of silence. One Instagram post. And suddenly the entire golf world stopped breathing. Woods says he's playing the Masters. "I've still got a few shots left that nobody's seen yet."
posts.author: TMR Editorial

posts.title: Viktor Hovland's Tee Shot at 17. Just... Watch It Again.
posts.excerpt: The ball hung over the water for what felt like three full seasons of television. Then gravity won.
posts.body: The ball hung over the water for what felt like three full seasons of television. Then gravity won. Hovland dropped his club. The crowd groaned. The commentators went silent. Golf is cruel.
posts.author: TMR Editorial

posts.title: The $600 Driver Isn't Making You Better
posts.excerpt: Average handicap hasn't moved in 15 years despite a billion dollars in game improvement tech.
posts.body: The 2024 data is in: average handicap hasn't moved in 15 years despite a billion dollars in "game improvement" tech. Maybe the game improves when you do.
